content_body: This cabin was just what the doctor ordered and well worth our second trip from Jacksonville, FL to Blue Ridge. We loved the beautiful views (the weather was great), the cabin was rustic with a luxurious feel, it just doesn't get any better. We loved the hot tub, horseback riding, the hikes down to the river and of course can't forget the ping pong & pool table playing either. Thank You for all that you do to make this the most relaxing, beautiful, and fun event we all have had in a long time! See you next year.
title: Beauty and Fun in a Luxury Blue Ridge Cabin
